title: Enable conversation refinement via state machine handlers

lint.note: All warnings pre-existing in other files

test.note: No test runner configured for unit tests

acceptance_criteria.AC-1: ROUTE_RESULTS handles SEND_MESSAGE -> transitions to PLANNING with existing sessionId
acceptance_criteria.AC-2: ROUTE_DETAILS handles SEND_MESSAGE -> transitions to PLANNING with existing sessionId
acceptance_criteria.AC-3: New routes replace active polylines (routeOptions preserved in PLANNING state), prior route cards preserved in history
acceptance_criteria.AC-4: No artificial delays added; architecture-level 12s constraint maintained
